mapper.select:
SELECT *
ORDER BY risk_level ORDER BY status ORDER BY channel ORDER BY detected_at
ASC DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT * FROM security_events WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE security_events SET user_id = #{userId}, event_type = #{eventType}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, status = #{status}, channel = #{channel}, detected_at = #{detectedAt}, reason = #{reason}, recommendation = #{recommendation}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE security_events SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
